fields.description: Vendor this rate is from (v2: multiple vendors per item).
fields.label: Supplier

fields.description: Lower bound of the qty range this rate applies to (blank = any).
fields.label: Min Qty

fields.description: Upper bound of the qty range (blank = any).
fields.label: Max Qty

fields.description: Currency the vendor quoted this rate in. Defaults to company currency.
fields.label: Currency

fields.description: Vendor currency -> company currency. Forced to 1 when they match; auto-fetched when left blank. Do NOT default this to 1 -- a non-blank value suppresses the auto-fetch and would push an unconverted foreign rate into costing.
fields.label: Exchange Rate

fields.description: Purchase rate as quoted, in the row's Currency.
fields.label: Rate

fields.description: Rate converted to company currency. This is the value pushed into costing on MD approval.
fields.label: Rate (Company Currency)

fields.description: Prefer this vendor when several match the qty range.
fields.label: Preferred
